dependencies.build_notes: Legacy env used spconv-cu121==2.3.8. ai only needs this for spconv backend parity; default TRELLIS.2 uses flex_gemm.
dependencies.name: spconv
dependencies.required_for: Optional sparse structure and SLAT convolution backend when SPARSE_CONV_BACKEND=spconv is selected; default is flex_gemm.

dependencies.build_notes: Legacy env used kaolin==0.17.0, but local TRELLIS.2 source has no kaolin import. Defer unless a later runtime path proves it required.
dependencies.name: kaolin
dependencies.package_hint: kaolin built for the active Torch/CUDA ABI
dependencies.required_for: Documented legacy env parity package; no active TRELLIS.2 source import found in the official runtime tree.

dependencies.build_notes: Official setup clones NVlabs/nvdiffrast at v0.4.0 and installs with --no-build-isolation.
dependencies.name: nvdiffrast
dependencies.required_for: Mesh/PBR rendering and GLB postprocessing rasterization.

dependencies.build_notes: Official setup clones CuMesh recursively and installs with --no-build-isolation. Build before o_voxel.
dependencies.name: cumesh
dependencies.required_for: CuMesh mesh simplification, UV unwrap, BVH, remeshing, and GLB postprocessing.

dependencies.build_notes: Official setup clones FlexGEMM recursively and installs with --no-build-isolation. Build before o_voxel.
dependencies.name: flex_gemm
dependencies.required_for: Default TRELLIS sparse convolution backend and 3D grid sampling.

dependencies.build_notes: Install from /data/clone/third_party/TRELLIS.2/o-voxel with --no-build-isolation after cumesh and flex_gemm are present.
dependencies.name: o_voxel
dependencies.required_for: Voxel IO/conversion/rasterization and final GLB export path.

dependencies.build_notes: Open3D 0.19.0 is already present in ai; keep as data-toolkit parity, not a core blocker.
dependencies.name: open3d
dependencies.required_for: Data toolkit geometry IO support and documented env parity; not an active official pipeline import in local TRELLIS.2 source.
